tools.name: call_recording_get
tools.description:
Get a download URL for a call recording audio file.

Returns ``{download_url, content_type, status_code, note}`` instead of the
binary audio stream. Fetch ``download_url`` to obtain the MP3.

tools.name: billing_invoices_download
tools.description:
Get a download URL for a billing invoice PDF.

Returns ``{download_url, content_type, status_code, note}`` instead of the
binary PDF stream. Fetch ``download_url`` to obtain the file.

tools.name: speech_analytics_file_get
tools.description:
Get a download URL for a speech-analytics audio file.

Returns ``{download_url, content_type, status_code, note}`` instead of the
binary audio stream (WAV/MP3/MP4). Fetch ``download_url`` to obtain the file.

tools.name: ten_dlc_brand_evidence_get
tools.description:
Get a download URL for a 10DLC brand evidence file.

Returns ``{download_url, content_type, status_code, note}`` instead of the
binary file stream. Fetch ``download_url`` to obtain the file.

tools.name: api_keys_list
tools.description: Returns a list of API keys.

tools.name: api_keys_create
tools.description: Creates an API key. Optional IP restrictions can be configured to limit access.

tools.name: api_keys_delete
tools.description: Deletes an API key. This action is permanent.

tools.name: api_keys_activate
tools.description: Activates an API key. Once activated, the API key can be used for authentication again.

tools.name: api_keys_deactivate
tools.description: Deactivates an API key. Once deactivated, the API key cannot be used for authentication.

tools.name: sip_trunks_list
tools.description: Returns a paginated list of SIP trunks. Results are limited to 25 records per page by default. Use `page` and `per_page` to navigate results.

tools.name: sip_trunks_create
tools.description: Creates a SIP trunk.

tools.name: sip_trunks_get
tools.description: Returns a SIP trunk configuration.

tools.name: sip_trunks_update
tools.description: Updates a SIP trunk configuration.

tools.name: sip_trunks_delete
tools.description: Deletes a SIP trunk.

tools.name: buy_countries_list
tools.description: Returns a list of countries where phone numbers are available.

tools.name: buy_regions_list
tools.description: Returns a list of regions (states or provinces) for countries where `has_provinces_or_states` is `true`.

tools.name: buy_cities_list
tools.description:
Returns a list of cities for countries where
 `has_provinces_or_states` is `false`.

tools.name: buy_region_cities_list
tools.description: Returns a list of cities in the specified region for countries where `has_provinces_or_states` is `true`.

tools.name: buy_numbers_list
tools.description: Returns a paginated list of phone numbers available for purchase.

tools.name: cart_get
tools.description: Returns the cart.

tools.name: cart_add
tools.description: Adds phone numbers to the cart.

tools.name: cart_remove
tools.description: Removes phone numbers from the cart.

tools.name: cart_checkout
tools.description: Checks out the cart. Activation and monthly fees are deducted from the account balance.

tools.name: my_numbers_list
tools.description: Returns a paginated list of phone numbers on the account. Results are limited to 25 records per page by default. Use `page` and `per_page` to navigate results.

tools.name: my_numbers_delete
tools.description: Releases phone numbers back to stock.

tools.name: my_numbers_get
tools.description: Returns a phone number.

tools.name: my_numbers_update
tools.description: Updates a phone number.

tools.name: my_numbers_sms_update
tools.description: Enables or disables inbound SMS support for a phone number.

tools.name: my_numbers_destinations_update
tools.description: Updates inbound call routing for phone numbers.

tools.name: my_numbers_papers_upload
tools.description:
Uploads a document for one or more phone numbers.
Uploaded files must meet the following requirements:
- Allowed formats: PNG, JPG, JPEG, TIFF, BMP, or PDF
- Maximum file size: 10 MB
- Files can't be password protected
- PDF files must not contain digital signatures

tools.name: cdrs_list
tools.description: Returns a paginated list of CDRs.

tools.name: cdrs_search
tools.description: Searches call transcriptions for specific keywords or phrases.

tools.name: cdrs_retranscribe
tools.description: Transcribes a recorded call.

tools.name: cdrs_transcription_get
tools.description: Returns a recorded call transcription.

tools.name: cdrs_get
tools.description: Returns call details.

tools.name: cdrs_list_all
tools.description: Returns CDRs in NDJSON format for bulk export.

tools.name: call_recording_list
tools.description: Returns a paginated list of call recordings.

tools.name: call_recording_delete
tools.description: Deletes a call recording.

tools.name: speech_analytics_create
tools.description:
Uploads an audio file for transcription. Wavix sends a POST callback to the specified callback URL when the transcription is complete.

Callback body:
```json
   {
        "request_id": "e865ea07-25af-4fdd-876e-04b0d41d5ebd",
        "status": "completed",
        "error": null
   }
```

- `request_

tools.name: speech_analytics_get
tools.description: Returns a transcription.

tools.name: speech_analytics_retranscribe
tools.description: Retranscribes an uploaded file.

tools.name: call_webhooks_list
tools.description: Returns a list of configured call webhooks. Wavix sends POST callbacks for `on-call` and `post-call` events.

tools.name: call_webhooks_create
tools.description: Creates a call webhook. Wavix sends POST callbacks for `on-call` and `post-call` events.

tools.name: call_webhooks_delete
tools.description: Deletes a call webhook.

tools.name: call_control_list
tools.description: Returns a list of active calls.

tools.name: call_control_create
tools.description: Starts an outbound call.

tools.name: call_control_get
tools.description: Returns a call.

tools.name: call_control_delete
tools.description: Ends an active call.

tools.name: call_control_update
tools.description: Updates an active call. Only the `tag` field can be modified.

tools.name: call_control_answer
tools.description: Answers an inbound call. Optionally initiate media streaming upon answering.

tools.name: call_control_streams_create
tools.description: Starts call media streaming.

tools.name: call_control_streams_delete
tools.description: Stops call media streaming.

tools.name: call_control_audio_play
tools.description: Plays audio in an active call.

tools.name: call_control_audio_stop
tools.description: Stops audio playback in an active call.

tools.name: call_control_collect
tools.description: Collects DTMF input in an active call.

tools.name: webrtc_tokens_list
tools.description: Returns a paginated list of active Wavix Embeddable widget tokens. Results are limited to 25 records per page by default. Use `page` and `per_page` to navigate results.

tools.name: webrtc_tokens_create
tools.description: Creates a Wavix Embeddable widget token.

tools.name: webrtc_tokens_get
tools.description: Returns a Wavix Embeddable widget token configuration.

tools.name: webrtc_tokens_update
tools.description: Updates the payload for a Wavix Embeddable widget token.

tools.name: webrtc_tokens_delete
tools.description: Deletes a Wavix Embeddable widget token. After deletion, the token can't be used to authenticate widget sessions, and any active session associated with it is terminated.

tools.name: sms_and_mms_sender_ids_list
tools.description: Returns a list of Sender IDs.

tools.name: sms_and_mms_sender_ids_create
tools.description: Creates a Sender ID. Use the 10DLC API to create Sender IDs in the US.

tools.name: sms_and_mms_sender_ids_get
tools.description: Returns a Sender ID.

tools.name: sms_and_mms_sender_ids_delete
tools.description: Deletes a Sender ID.

tools.name: sms_and_mms_opt_outs_list
tools.description: Returns a paginated list of opted-out phone numbers. Results are limited to 25 records per page by default. Use `page` and `per_page` to navigate results.

tools.name: sms_and_mms_opt_outs_create
tools.description:
Creates an opt-out for a Sender ID, 10DLC campaign,
 or all outbound messages.

tools.name: sms_and_mms_messages_list
tools.description: Returns a paginated list of SMS and MMS messages.

tools.name: sms_and_mms_messages_send
tools.description:
Sends SMS or MMS messages. MMS is supported for U.S. numbers only.
**Rate limit**: 20 messages per phone number in 24 hours.

tools.name: sms_and_mms_messages_get
tools.description: Returns a message.

tools.name: sms_and_mms_messages_list_all
tools.description: Returns SMS and MMS messages in newline-delimited JSON (NDJSON) format.

tools.name: ten_dlc_brands_list
tools.description: Returns a paginated list of 10DLC brands. Filter results by date, name, legal name, and status. Results are limited to 25 records per page by default. Use `page` and `per_page` to navigate results.

tools.name: ten_dlc_brands_create
tools.description: Registers a 10DLC Brand. TCR automatically verifies the brand identity. Only brands with `VERIFIED` or `VETTED_VERIFIED` identity status can register 10DLC Campaigns.

tools.name: ten_dlc_brands_get
tools.description: Returns a 10DLC Brand.

tools.name: ten_dlc_brands_update
tools.description: Updates a 10DLC brand. Updating identity-related parameters, including  `ein_taxid`, `ein_taxid_country`, and `entity_type`, resets the Brand status to `UNVERIFIED` and triggers automatic re-submission. Brands in `VETTED_VERIFIED` status or with active Campaigns cannot be updated.

tools.name: ten_dlc_brands_delete
tools.description: Deletes a 10DLC Brand. Brands with active campaigns cannot be deleted.

tools.name: ten_dlc_brand_appeals_list
tools.description: Returns a list of brand identity verification appeals.

tools.name: ten_dlc_brand_appeals_create
tools.description:
Submits an appeal for 10DLC brand identity verification. Provide any additional documentation to support the appeal. Use `appeal_category` to specify the appeal type:
- `VERIFY_TAX_ID` — Use if the brand is UNVERIFIED due to a tax ID mismatch. Applies to private companies, public companies, non-prof

tools.name: ten_dlc_brand_evidence_list
tools.description: Use this method to list previously uploaded Brand appeal evidence.

tools.name: ten_dlc_brand_evidence_upload
tools.description: Uploads 10DLC Brand evidence. Supported formats include .jpg, .png, .pdf, and more. File size must be under 10MB.

tools.name: ten_dlc_brand_evidence_delete
tools.description: Deletes a 10DLC Brand evidence file.

tools.name: ten_dlc_brand_vettings_list
tools.description: Returns a list of external vettings for a 10DLC Brand.

tools.name: ten_dlc_brand_vettings_import
tools.description: Imports an existing external vetting for a 10DLC Brand.

tools.name: ten_dlc_brand_vettings_create
tools.description: Requests external vetting for a 10DLC Brand. Supported providers: `AEGIS`, `CV`, `WMC`. Supported classes: `STANDARD`, `ENHANCED`.

tools.name: ten_dlc_brand_vetting_appeals_list
tools.description: Returns a list of external vetting appeals for a 10DLC Brand.

tools.name: ten_dlc_brand_vetting_appeals_create
tools.description: Submits an appeal for a 10DLC Brand external vetting.

tools.name: ten_dlc_brand_usecase_qualify
tools.description: Returns the qualification results for a 10DLC Brand use case. Includes MNO-specific attributes, restrictions, and fees.

tools.name: ten_dlc_campaigns_list
tools.description: Returns a paginated list of 10DLC Campaigns. Filter results by date, status, and use case. Results are limited to 25 records per page by default. Use `page` and `per_page` to navigate results.

tools.name: ten_dlc_brand_campaigns_list
tools.description:
Returns 10DLC Campaigns associated with a Brand.
 Results are limited to 25 records per page by default.
  Use `page` and `per_page` to navigate results.

tools.name: ten_dlc_brand_campaigns_create
tools.description: Registers a 10DLC Campaign.

tools.name: ten_dlc_brand_campaigns_get
tools.description: Returns a 10DLC Campaign.

tools.name: ten_dlc_brand_campaigns_update
tools.description: Updates a 10DLC Campaign.

tools.name: ten_dlc_brand_campaigns_delete
tools.description: Deletes a 10DLC Campaign. Associated phone numbers cannot be used as Sender IDs once the Campaign is deleted.

tools.name: ten_dlc_subscriptions_list
tools.description: Returns a list of 10DLC event subscriptions.

tools.name: ten_dlc_subscriptions_create
tools.description: Subscribes to Wavix 10DLC event callbacks.

tools.name: ten_dlc_subscriptions_delete
tools.description: Deletes a 10DLC event subscription.

tools.name: ten_dlc_campaign_numbers_link
tools.description: Links a phone number to a 10DLC Campaign. Wavix automatically creates a Sender ID once the number is approved.

tools.name: ten_dlc_campaign_numbers_unlink
tools.description: Unlinks a phone number from a 10DLC Campaign. The associated Sender ID is also deleted.

tools.name: ten_dlc_campaign_numbers_list
tools.description: Returns a list of phone numbers associated with a 10DLC Campaign.

tools.name: ten_dlc_campaigns_nudge
tools.description:
Requests action on a pending or rejected 10DLC Campaign. Use `nudge_intent` to specify the action: 
- `REVIEW`: Request review for a pending Campaign. - `APPEAL_REJECTION`: Appeal a rejected Campaign.
Note:
- The Campaign must be at least 72 hours old.
- Only one nudge request per Campaign is allowe

tools.name: number_validator_get
tools.description: Returns details for a phone number.

tools.name: number_validator_create_bulk
tools.description: Returns details for multiple phone numbers. If `async` is true, returns a token to poll for results.

tools.name: number_validator_results_get
tools.description: Returns asynchronous validation results.

tools.name: voice_campaigns_create
tools.description: Triggers an outbound call based on a pre-configured scenario.

tools.name: voice_campaigns_get
tools.description: Returns a specific voice campaign.

tools.name: link_shortener_create
tools.description: Creates a short link.

tools.name: link_shortener_metrics_list
tools.description: Returns short link metrics.

tools.name: two_fa_verification_create
tools.description:
Creates a new 2FA Verification and sends a one-time password (OTP) to the destination phone number.
Before using this endpoint, create a 2FA Service in the Wavix portal. The service is created once and reused to generate and validate OTPs.
OTP flow:
1. Create a Verification to generate and send an O

tools.name: two_fa_sessions_list
tools.description: Returns a list of 2FA verifications. Filter by service or date.

tools.name: two_fa_verification_resend
tools.description: Resends the verification code using the specified channel. Previously sent codes are invalidated.

tools.name: two_fa_verification_check
tools.description: Validates the verification code.

tools.name: two_fa_verification_cancel
tools.description: Cancels a 2FA verification. After cancellation, no additional codes are sent, and previously sent codes can no longer be validated. You must create a new verification to send another code.

tools.name: two_fa_events_list
tools.description: Returns a list of events for a specific 2FA Verification.

tools.name: billing_transactions_list
tools.description: Returns a paginated list of financial transactions.

tools.name: billing_invoices_list
tools.description: Returns a paginated list of financial statements.

tools.name: profile_get
tools.description: Returns the account profile and billing details.

tools.name: profile_update
tools.description: Updates the account profile and billing details.

tools.name: profile_config_get
tools.description: Returns the account balance and configuration details.

tools.name: sub_accounts_list
tools.description: Returns a paginated list of sub-accounts. Results are limited to 25 records per page by default. Use `page` and `per_page` to navigate results.

tools.name: sub_accounts_create
tools.description: Creates a sub-account.

tools.name: sub_accounts_get
tools.description: Returns a specific sub-account. Results are limited to 25 records per page by default. Use `page` and `per_page` to navigate results.

tools.name: sub_accounts_update
tools.description: Updates a sub-account's configuration.

tools.name: sub_accounts_transactions_list
tools.description: Returns a paginated list of transactions for a specific sub-account. Filter by date range and type. Results are paginated with 25 records per page by default. Use `page` and `per_page` to navigate results.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "my_numbers_papers_upload" references sensitive artifacts (password). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Uploads a document for one or more phone numbers. Uploaded files must meet the following requirements: - Allowed formats: PNG, JPG, JPEG, TIFF, BMP, or PDF - Ma…

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "two_fa_verification_create" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Creates a new 2FA Verification and sends a one-time password (OTP) to the destination phone number. Before using this endpoint, create a 2FA Service in the Wavi…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "two_fa_verification_create" references sensitive artifacts (password). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Creates a new 2FA Verification and sends a one-time password (OTP) to the destination phone number. Before using this endpoint, create a 2FA Service in the Wavi…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: call_recording_get, billing_invoices_download, speech_analytics_file_get, ten_dlc_brand_evidence_get, call_webhooks_list, sms_and_mms_messages_list, sms_and_mms_messages_get, sms_and_mms_messages_list_all · Private data: call_recording_get, billing_invoices_download, speech_analytics_file_get, ten_dlc_brand_evidence_get, api_keys_list, api_keys_create, api_keys_delete, api_keys_activate, api_keys_deactivate, sip_trunks_list, my_numbers_list, my_numbers_papers_upload, speech_analytics_create, speech_analytics_retranscribe, webrtc_tokens_list, webrtc_tokens_create, webrtc_tokens_get, webrtc_tokens_update, webrtc_tokens_delete, sms_and_mms_opt_outs_list, ten_dlc_brands_list, ten_dlc_brand_appeals_create, ten_dlc_brand_evidence_upload, ten_dlc_brand_evidence_delete, ten_dlc_campaigns_list, ten_dlc_brand_campaigns_list, number_validator_create_bulk, two_fa_verification_create, sub_accounts_list, sub_accounts_get, sub_accounts_transactions_list · Public sink: my_numbers_sms_update, my_numbers_papers_upload, speech_analytics_create, call_webhooks_list, call_webhooks_create, call_webhooks_delete, sms_and_mms_sender_ids_list, sms_and_mms_sender_ids_create, sms_and_mms_sender_ids_get, sms_and_mms_sender_ids_delete, sms_and_mms_opt_outs_list, sms_and_mms_opt_outs_create, sms_and_mms_messages_list, sms_and_mms_messages_send, sms_and_mms_messages_get, sms_and_mms_messages_list_all, ten_dlc_brand_evidence_upload, two_fa_verification_create, two_fa_verification_cancel · Destructive: api_keys_delete, sip_trunks_delete, cart_remove, my_numbers_delete, cdrs_list_all, call_recording_delete, call_webhooks_delete, call_control_delete, call_control_streams_delete, webrtc_tokens_delete, sms_and_mms_sender_ids_delete, sms_and_mms_messages_list_all, ten_dlc_brands_delete, ten_dlc_brand_evidence_delete, ten_dlc_brand_campaigns_delete, ten_dlc_subscriptions_delete.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: call_recording_get, billing_invoices_download, speech_analytics_file_get, ten_dlc_brand_evidence_get, call_webhooks_list, sms_and_mms_messages_list, sms_and_mms_messages_get, sms_and_mms_messages_list_all · Private data: call_recording_get, billing_invoices_download, speech_analytics_file_get, ten_dlc_brand_evidence_get, api_keys_list, api_keys_create, api_keys_delete, api_keys_activate, api_keys_deactivate, sip_trunks_list, my_numbers_list, my_numbers_papers_upload, speech_analytics_create, speech_analytics_retranscribe, webrtc_tokens_list, webrtc_tokens_create, webrtc_tokens_get, webrtc_tokens_update, webrtc_tokens_delete, sms_and_mms_opt_outs_list, ten_dlc_brands_list, ten_dlc_brand_appeals_create, ten_dlc_brand_evidence_upload, ten_dlc_brand_evidence_delete, ten_dlc_campaigns_list, ten_dlc_brand_campaigns_list, number_validator_create_bulk, two_fa_verification_create, sub_accounts_list, sub_accounts_get, sub_accounts_transactions_list · Public sink: my_numbers_sms_update, my_numbers_papers_upload, speech_analytics_create, call_webhooks_list, call_webhooks_create, call_webhooks_delete, sms_and_mms_sender_ids_list, sms_and_mms_sender_ids_create, sms_and_mms_sender_ids_get, sms_and_mms_sender_ids_delete, sms_and_mms_opt_outs_list, sms_and_mms_opt_outs_create, sms_and_mms_messages_list, sms_and_mms_messages_send, sms_and_mms_messages_get, sms_and_mms_messages_list_all, ten_dlc_brand_evidence_upload, two_fa_verification_create, two_fa_verification_cancel · Destructive: api_keys_delete, sip_trunks_delete, cart_remove, my_numbers_delete, cdrs_list_all, call_recording_delete, call_webhooks_delete, call_control_delete, call_control_streams_delete, webrtc_tokens_delete, sms_and_mms_sender_ids_delete, sms_and_mms_messages_list_all, ten_dlc_brands_delete, ten_dlc_brand_evidence_delete, ten_dlc_brand_campaigns_delete, ten_dlc_subscriptions_delete

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
